en.summary: In this lengthy sermon delivered from his pulpit, the Prophet Muhammad (s) addresses Imam Ali (as) with a series of declarations praising him and his followers (Shi'a). The sermon was narrated through a chain going back to Imam al-Sadiq (as). The Prophet describes Ali as the banner of the nation, the gate of the City of Knowledge, the Commander of the Faithful, and the leader of the shining believers. He characterizes Ali's followers as chosen ones whose mention appears in the Torah and the Gospel, whose spirits are received by the angels, and who will be safe on the Day of Judgment at the Pond and under the shade of the Throne. The Prophet cites Quran 21:101 and 21:103 as having been revealed about them. He commands Ali to convey his greetings to future believers, urges them to hold fast to the rope of Allah, and concludes by calling them 'the lanterns in the darkness' - repeated three times for emphasis.

key_terms.المساكين والمستضعفين: The needy and the oppressed - those marginalized by society
key_terms.مدينة العلم: City of Knowledge - title for the Prophet as the source of divine knowledge
key_terms.أمير المؤمنين: Commander of the Faithful - the exclusive title of Imam Ali
key_terms.حزب الله: Party of Allah - Quranic designation (5:56) for the allies of God
key_terms.مصابيح الدجى: Lanterns in the darkness - metaphor for the Shi'a guiding in times of misguidance

en.seo_question: What did the Prophet Muhammad say about Imam Ali and his followers in the Sermon of the Pulpit?

ur.summary: اس طویل خطبے میں نبی محمد (ص) امام علی (ع) سے مخاطب هو کر ان کی اور ان کے پیروکاروں کی تعریف میں اعلانات فرماتے هیں۔

tr.summary: Bu uzun hutbede Peygamber Muhammed (s) İmam Ali'ye hitap ederek onu ve takipçilerini öven beyanlarda bulunur.

fa.summary: در این خطبه طولانی پیامبر محمد (ص) امام علی (ع) را مورد خطاب قرار داده و ایشان و پیروانشان را می‌ستایند.

id.summary: Dalam khutbah panjang ini Nabi Muhammad (saw) menyapa Imam Ali (as) dengan serangkaian pernyataan memuji beliau dan pengikutnya (Syiah).

bn.summary: এই দীর্ঘ খুতবায় নবী মুহাম্মাদ (সা.) ইমাম আলী (আ.)-কে সম্বোধন করে তাঁর ও তাঁর অনুসারীদের প্রশংসায় ঘোষণা দেন।

es.summary: En este extenso sermón el Profeta Muhammad (s) se dirige al Imam Ali (as) con declaraciones elogiándolo a él y a sus seguidores.

fr.summary: Dans ce long sermon le Prophète Muhammad (s) s'adresse à l'Imam Ali (as) par des déclarations le louant lui et ses partisans.

de.summary: In dieser langen Predigt richtet sich der Prophet Muhammad (s) an Imam Ali (as) mit Erklärungen, die ihn und seine Anhänger preisen.

ru.summary: В этой длинной проповеди Пророк Мухаммад (с) обращается к Имаму Али (ас) с высказываниями, восхваляющими его и его последователей.

zh.summary: 在这篇长篇演说中先知穆罕默德（愿主福安之）向伊玛目阿里发表了一系列赞美他及其追随者的声明。

translations.en: My father (may Allah be pleased with him) narrated to us, saying: Sa'd b. 'Abdullah narrated to us, saying: Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Khalid narrated to us, from al-Qasim b. Yahya, from his grandfather al-Hasan b. Rashid, from Abu 'Abdullah al-Sadiq Ja'far b. Muhammad, from his forefathers, from the Commander of the Faithful (peace be upon them), who said: The Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him and his family) said to me on his pulpit:
translations.ur: همارے والد (رضی الله عنه) نے هم سے بیان کیا، کها: سعد بن عبد الله نے هم سے بیان کیا، کها: احمد بن محمد بن خالد نے هم سے بیان کیا، القاسم بن یحییٰ سے، ان کے دادا الحسن بن راشد سے، ابو عبد الله الصادق جعفر بن محمد سے، ان کے آباء سے، امیر المؤمنین (علیہم السلام) سے، فرمایا: رسول الله (صلی الله علیه وآله) نے اپنے منبر پر مجھ سے فرمایا:
translations.tr: Babam (Allah ondan razı olsun) bize rivayet etti: Sa'd b. Abdullah bize rivayet etti: Ahmed b. Muhammed b. Halid bize rivayet etti, Kasım b. Yahya'dan, dedesi Hasan b. Raşid'den, Ebu Abdullah es-Sadık Cafer b. Muhammed'den, babalarından, Müminlerin Emiri'nden (aleyhimüsselam): Resulullah (sallallahu aleyhi ve alihi) minberinde bana dedi ki:
translations.fa: پدرم (رضی الله عنه) برای ما نقل کرد: سعد بن عبدالله برای ما نقل کرد: احمد بن محمد بن خالد برای ما نقل کرد، از قاسم بن یحیی، از جدش حسن بن راشد، از ابوعبدالله صادق جعفر بن محمد، از پدرانش، از امیرالمؤمنین (علیهم السلام): رسول خدا (صلی الله علیه وآله) بر منبرش به من فرمود:
translations.id: Ayah kami (semoga Allah meridhainya) menceritakan kepada kami: Sa'd bin Abdullah menceritakan kepada kami: Ahmad bin Muhammad bin Khalid menceritakan kepada kami, dari al-Qasim bin Yahya, dari kakeknya al-Hasan bin Rasyid, dari Abu Abdillah al-Shadiq Ja'far bin Muhammad, dari leluhurnya, dari Amirul Mukminin (alaihimus salam): Rasulullah (shallallahu alaihi wa alihi) bersabda kepadaku di atas mimbarnya:
translations.bn: আমাদের পিতা (রাদিয়াল্লাহু আনহু) আমাদের কাছে বর্ণনা করেছেন: সা'দ বিন আবদুল্লাহ আমাদের কাছে বর্ণনা করেছেন: আহমাদ বিন মুহাম্মাদ বিন খালিদ আমাদের কাছে বর্ণনা করেছেন, আল-কাসিম বিন ইয়াহইয়া থেকে, তাঁর দাদা আল-হাসান বিন রাশিদ থেকে, আবু আবদিল্লাহ আল-সাদিক জাফর বিন মুহাম্মাদ থেকে, তাঁর পূর্বপুরুষদের থেকে, আমিরুল মুমিনীন (আলাইহিমুস সালাম) থেকে: রাসূলুল্লাহ (সাল্লাল্লাহু আলাইহি ওয়া আলিহি) তাঁর মিম্বরে আমাকে বলেছেন:
translations.es: Nuestro padre (que Allah esté complacido con él) nos narró: Sa'd b. 'Abdullah nos narró: Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Khalid nos narró, de al-Qasim b. Yahya, de su abuelo al-Hasan b. Rashid, de Abu 'Abdullah al-Sadiq Ya'far b. Muhammad, de sus antepasados, del Comandante de los Creyentes (la paz sea con ellos): El Mensajero de Allah me dijo en su púlpito:
translations.fr: Notre père (qu'Allah soit satisfait de lui) nous a rapporté: Sa'd b. 'Abdullah nous a rapporté: Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Khalid nous a rapporté, d'après al-Qasim b. Yahya, d'après son grand-père al-Hasan b. Rashid, d'après Abu 'Abdullah al-Sadiq Ja'far b. Muhammad, d'après ses ancêtres, d'après le Commandeur des Croyants (que la paix soit sur eux): Le Messager d'Allah m'a dit sur son minbar:
translations.de: Unser Vater (möge Allah mit ihm zufrieden sein) berichtete uns: Sa'd b. 'Abdullah berichtete uns: Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Khalid berichtete uns, von al-Qasim b. Yahya, von seinem Großvater al-Hasan b. Raschid, von Abu 'Abdullah al-Sadiq Dscha'far b. Muhammad, von seinen Vorvätern, vom Befehlshaber der Gläubigen (Friede sei mit ihnen): Der Gesandte Allahs sagte zu mir auf seiner Kanzel:
translations.ru: Наш отец (да будет доволен им Аллах) рассказал нам: Са'д б. 'Абдуллах рассказал нам: Ахмад б. Мухаммад б. Халид рассказал нам от аль-Касима б. Яхьи, от его деда аль-Хасана б. Рашида, от Абу 'Абдиллаха ас-Садика Джа'фара б. Мухаммада, от его предков, от Повелителя правоверных (мир им): Посланник Аллаха сказал мне на своём минбаре:
translations.zh: 我们的父亲（愿真主喜悦他）向我们传述说：萨阿德·本·阿卜杜拉向我们传述说：艾哈迈德·本·穆罕默德·本·哈利德向我们传述，从嘎西姆·本·叶哈亚，从他的祖父哈桑·本·拉希德，从阿布·阿卜杜拉·萨迪格·贾法尔·本·穆罕默德，从他的先辈们，从信士们的长官（愿主赐他们平安）：真主的使者（愿主福安之及其家属）在他的讲坛上对我说：

translations.en: O Ali! Allah (mighty and majestic) has gifted you with the love of the needy and the oppressed on earth, so you were pleased with them as brethren and they were pleased with you as an Imam. Blessed is he who loves you and believes in you, and woe to he who hates you and belies you. O Ali! You are the banner of this nation; whoever loves you succeeds, and whoever hates you perishes. O Ali! I am the City of Knowledge and you are its gate - can a city be entered except through its gate?! O Ali! The people of your love are every penitent, mindful person, and every humble one who, if he swore upon Allah, would have his oath fulfilled. O Ali! Your brethren are every pure, devout striver who loves for your sake and hates for your sake - despised among creation but great in rank with Allah. O Ali! Those who love you are the neighbors of Allah in the Abode of Paradise; they do not grieve for what they left behind. O Ali! I am the guardian of whoever you befriend, and I am the enemy of whoever you oppose. O Ali! Whoever loves you has loved me, and whoever hates you has hated me. O Ali! Your brethren have withered lips; monasticism is recognized in their faces. O Ali! Your brethren rejoice in three stations: at the departure of their souls while I and you witness them, at the questioning in their graves, and at the Great Presentation and at the Bridge when creation is asked about their faith and they cannot answer.
translations.ur: اے علی! الله عزوجل نے تمہیں مسکینوں اور زمین کے کمزوروں کی محبت عطا کی هے۔
translations.tr: Ey Ali! Allah sana yoksulların ve mustazafların sevgisini bağışladı.
translations.fa: ای علی! خداوند عزوجل محبت مسکینان و مستضعفان زمین را به تو عطا کرد.
translations.id: Wahai Ali! Allah Azza wa Jalla telah menganugerahimu cinta orang-orang miskin dan kaum tertindas.
translations.bn: হে আলী! আল্লাহ তোমাকে পৃথিবীর অভাবী ও দুর্বলদের ভালোবাসা দান করেছেন।
translations.es: ¡Oh Ali! Allah te ha otorgado el amor de los necesitados y los oprimidos.
translations.fr: Ô Ali ! Allah t'a gratifié de l'amour des nécessiteux et des opprimés.
translations.de: O Ali! Allah hat dir die Liebe der Bedürftigen und der Unterdrückten geschenkt.
translations.ru: О Али! Аллах даровал тебе любовь нуждающихся и угнетённых.
translations.zh: 阿里啊！真主赐予了你对大地上贫弱者和被压迫者的爱。

translations.en: O Ali! Your war is my war, and your peace is my peace; and my war is the war of Allah. O Ali! Give glad tidings to your brethren, for Allah is pleased with them. O Ali! You are the Commander of the Faithful and the Leader of the Radiant Ones. O Ali! Your Shi'a are the chosen ones. Were it not for you and your Shi'a, no religion would be established for Allah, and were it not for your presence on earth, no rain would fall from the sky. O Ali! You have a treasure in Paradise. O Ali! You and your Shi'a are the establishers of justice. O Ali! You and your Shi'a will be at the Pond. Regarding you was this verse revealed: 'Surely those for whom the finest reward has preceded from Us - those will be kept far from it' [21:101], and 'The Great Dismay will not grieve them' [21:103].
translations.ur: اے علی! تمہاری جنگ میری جنگ هے اور تمہاری صلح میری صلح هے۔
translations.tr: Ey Ali! Senin savaşın benim savaşımdır.
translations.fa: ای علی! جنگ تو جنگ من است و صلح تو صلح من.
translations.id: Wahai Ali! Perangmu adalah perangku, dan damaimu adalah damaiku.
translations.bn: হে আলী! তোমার যুদ্ধ আমার যুদ্ধ।
translations.es: ¡Oh Ali! Tu guerra es mi guerra.
translations.fr: Ô Ali ! Ta guerre est ma guerre.
translations.de: O Ali! Dein Krieg ist mein Krieg.
translations.ru: О Али! Твоя война — моя война.
translations.zh: 阿里啊！你的战争就是我的战争。

translations.en: O Ali! You and your Shi'a will be sought at the Standing, while you will be in the Gardens enjoying bliss. O Ali! The angels and the treasurers long for you. O Ali! Your Shi'a are those who fear Allah in secret. O Ali! Your Shi'a are those who compete for the highest ranks. O Ali! The deeds of your Shi'a will be presented to me every Friday. O Ali! Your mention is in the Torah, and likewise in the Gospel. So ask the people of the Gospel about Ilya. O Ali! The mention of your companions in heaven is greater than on earth.
translations.ur: اے علی! تم اور تمہارے شیعہ موقف میں تلاش کیے جائیں گے۔
translations.tr: Ey Ali! Sen ve şiaların Mahşer'de aranacaksınız.
translations.fa: ای علی! تو و شیعیانت در موقف جستجو می‌شوید.
translations.id: Wahai Ali! Engkau dan syiahmu akan dicari di Mahsyar.
translations.bn: হে আলী! তুমি ও তোমার শীয়ারা মাহশারে খোঁজা হবে।
translations.es: ¡Oh Ali! Tú y tus seguidores seréis buscados en la Estación.
translations.fr: Ô Ali ! Toi et tes partisans serez recherchés à la Station.
translations.de: O Ali! Du und deine Schi'a werdet an der Stätte gesucht.
translations.ru: О Али! Тебя и твоих последователей будут искать на Стоянии.
translations.zh: 阿里啊！在驻留之地人们将寻找你和你的追随者。

translations.en: O Ali! The spirits of your Shi'a ascend to heaven during their sleep and at their death. O Ali! Tell your companions to abstain from the deeds that their enemy commits. O Ali! The anger of Allah is intensified against those who despise them and dissociate from you, and hate us the People of the House. O Ali! Convey my greetings to those whom I will not see. Inform them that Allah is pleased with them and that He commands the angels to seek forgiveness on their behalf.
translations.ur: اے علی! تمہارے شیعوں کی ارواح آسمان کی طرف اٹھتی هیں۔
translations.tr: Ey Ali! Şialarının ruhları göğe yükselir.
translations.fa: ای علی! ارواح شیعیانت به آسمان بالا می‌رود.
translations.id: Wahai Ali! Ruh-ruh syiahmu naik ke langit.
translations.bn: হে আলী! তোমার শীয়াদের আত্মা আকাশে ওঠে।
translations.es: ¡Oh Ali! Las almas de tus seguidores ascienden al cielo.
translations.fr: Ô Ali ! Les esprits de tes partisans montent au ciel.
translations.de: O Ali! Die Seelen deiner Schi'a steigen zum Himmel auf.
translations.ru: О Али! Души твоих последователей поднимаются к небесам.
translations.zh: 阿里啊！你的追随者的灵魂升向天空。

translations.en: O Ali! Do not cease supporting a people who love you out of my love for you. They have borne hostility yet refused anything but our support - so be merciful to them, for Allah has chosen them for our sake, created them from our clay, and entrusted them with our secret. While the people are lost in misguidance, your Shi'a are on the upright path of truth. The world is not of them and they are not of it. Those are the lanterns in the darkness. Those are the lanterns in the darkness. Those are the lanterns in the darkness.
translations.ur: اے علی! ان لوگوں کی مدد سے دستبردار نہ هو۔ یہی اندھیروں کے چراغ هیں۔
translations.tr: Ey Ali! Seni seven toplumu desteklemekten vazgeçme. İşte onlar karanlıktaki kandillerdir.
translations.fa: ای علی! از یاری قومی دست نکش. اینانند چراغ‌های تاریکی.
translations.id: Wahai Ali! Janganlah berhenti mendukung kaum yang mencintaimu. Mereka itulah pelita dalam kegelapan.
translations.bn: হে আলী! সেই জনগোষ্ঠীকে সাহায্য করা থেকে বিরত হয়ো না। এরাই অন্ধকারের প্রদীপ।
translations.es: ¡Oh Ali! No dejes de apoyar a quienes te aman. Esos son las lámparas en la oscuridad.
translations.fr: Ô Ali ! Ne cesse pas de soutenir ceux qui t'aiment. Ceux-là sont les lanternes dans les ténèbres.
translations.de: O Ali! Höre nicht auf, jene zu unterstützen, die dich lieben. Jene sind die Leuchten in der Finsternis.
translations.ru: О Али! Не прекращай поддерживать тех, кто любит тебя. Они — светильники во тьме.
translations.zh: 阿里啊！不要停止支持那些爱你的人。他们就是黑暗中的明灯。

narrators.known_identity: Ali b. al-Husayn b. Babawayh al-Qummi
Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Khalid al-Barqi

narrators.ambiguity_note: Identified as al-Qasim b. Yahya; specific identity less well-known
Grandfather of al-Qasim b. Yahya; identified in chain context

narrators.name_ar: أبو عبد الله الصادق جعفر بن محمد
narrators.known_identity: Imam Ja'far al-Sadiq (as), the Sixth Imam
Imam Ali b. Abi Talib (as), the First Imam and Commander of the Faithful

key_phrases.phrase_en: City of Knowledge and you are its Gate
Your war is my war and your peace is my peace

similar_content_hints.description: Other sermons of the Prophet praising Imam Ali and his followers, particularly those found in Nahj al-Balagha
Hadiths describing the virtues of the Shia of Ali and their rewards in the Hereafter
Traditions about the Prophet being the City of Knowledge and Ali being its Gate
